name: prompt-memory
description: Local-first prompt archive for AI coding tools.

interface.shortDescription: Capture and search local coding-agent prompts
interface.longDescription: Prompt Memory captures prompts from supported coding agents through local hooks, redacts sensitive values before storage, indexes Markdown in SQLite, and serves a local web UI for search, review, and deletion.
defaultPrompt: Set up prompt-memory for this machine
Check whether prompt-memory is capturing Codex prompts
